description_long: This object represents an elderly person with a slender build, featuring a long, white ponytail hairstyle. The figure is dressed in a long, dark brown coat or robe that drapes down, with lighter brown or grayish accents visible on the sleeves and lower sections. The posture appears slightly hunched, with the head angled downward and the arms close to the body, suggesting a reserved or cautious stance. The surface of the figure is smooth and somewhat reflective, with a glossy finish that highlights the contours of the clothing and hair. The facial features are not clearly visible, but the head is proportionally small compared to the body, and the hair is the most distinctive feature. The overall form is stylized, with exaggerated proportions and simplified anatomical details.
description: A slender elderly person with a long white ponytail, wearing a dark brown robe and standing in a slightly hunched posture. The figure has a smooth, glossy surface and stylized proportions.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the back and top of the head, highlighting the long white ponytail and the draped brown robe.
description_view_1: View 1 presents a low side angle, emphasizing the length of the robe and the reflective surface of the clothing.
description_view_2: View 2 displays the back and side, with the ponytail and the hunched posture more visible, as well as the angular shape of the robe.
description_view_3: View 3 offers a side view, showing the head turned downward and the robe's flowing lines, with the ponytail extending outward.
attribute_clothing_style: Long, dark brown robe or coat with lighter accents, no visible patterns or accessories.
attribute_posture: Slightly hunched, head angled downward, arms close to body.
attribute_facial_features: Facial features not clearly visible; head is small and angled downward.
